text.title: Lean Stack Bootstrapper Blueprint Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether lean-stack-bootstrapper-blueprint applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the project pre-PMF (<$2k MRR) and solo/duo founder?

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1-five-services-max` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
